name: MoveGoalValue
notes: resolve one move-goal operand by kind (heading/altitude/speed/...); executes CreateMoveGoal records for MoveObj
MoveGoalValue switch jump-table / tail data (computed access)

name: _GRAPHICInit@0
notes: init the 100-entry _graphics effect pool + per-type .SH handle table (crater/smoke/fire/exp/debris/chaff/flare/spd/mpd/lpd); see objects.md GRAPHIC effect spawning

name: _GRAPHICUpdate@0
notes: step every live GRAPHIC entry via FUN_00442e10 (motion/fuse/adder emission), then _UpdateLoopSounds

name: _GRAPHICAddExp@28
notes: spawn an explosion: random type-variation, chained debris/cluster-release/smoke children, MP mirror
type: undefined4 __stdcall GRAPHICAddExp(undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4)

name: ChainRemoveCurObj
notes: unlink the current object from a service chain head; clears in-chain flag (entity +0x01 bit1)

name: ChainInsertCurObj
notes: ordered insert of the current object by service key (+0x68); honors correctChainPlacement

name: ChainMergeSorted
notes: merge the re-queue chain back into chainStart keeping +0x68 order

name: ProcessHitMsgs
notes: drain MSG 0x800B/0x800C remote hit events; raises event 0x4000 and spawns explosion via GRAPHICAddExp

name: ProcessEffectMsgs
notes: drain per-computer MSG 0x8003+n remote effect spawns: explosion / smoke / MANAdd

name: PadlockTarget
notes: pick the object id the player is visually tracking (angle+distance gates, wingman fallback)

name: NearbyGroupLeader
notes: return the group leader id when the current object flies in role 2 within 0xC800
